Struct RenderCommand

Namespace
ClaySharp.Interop

BlackHook.ClaySharp.dll

Encapsulates a single drawing instruction emitted by Clay's layout resolver.

ZIndex

Layer depth index. Elements with higher Z-indexes should render on top.
